steps.title: Find and compare medians
steps.content:
With 5 values, the median is the middle (3rd) value when ordered.
Foothill ordered: 70, 75, 76, 80, 87
Valley ordered: 44, 54, 65, 76, 82
Foothill median = 76; Valley median = 65. Since 76 > 65, Statement II is true. Both statements are true, so that matches choice C — C is correct.
